# TizWildin Entertainment HUB Public Index

Generated: 2026-05-08
Base URL: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB

This is the crawler/LLM-friendly plain text index for the GareBear99 / TizWildin / ARC ecosystem.

## ARC Source Spine

- Ecosystem File Search: Queryable source-repository file and link lookup page for indexed ARC and TizWildin repositories.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/ecosystem-file-search.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB
  Tags: file-search, source-index, repo-search, link-search

- Ecosystem Search: Static full-text search route across public project pages, source repository files, extracted links, route metadata, and submission/discovery records.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/ecosystem-search.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB

## Discovery Lists and Public Routes

- Awesome Audio Plugins Dev: START HERE: the main public entry list for the GareBear99 / TizWildin audio ecosystem. Curated audio plugin development and discovery resources for JUCE, VST3/AU, DSP, open-source plugin projects, FreeEQ8, FreeVox8, and developer visibility.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/awesome-audio-plugins-dev.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/awesome-audio-plugins-dev
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/awesome-audio-plugins-dev

- Awesome Audio Lists: Parent hub for audio directories, plugin submission targets, sample-pack directories, music-platform lists, and public discovery surfaces.

  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/awesome-audio-lists
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/awesome-audio-lists
  Tags: audio lists, submission targets, SEO hub, discovery, discovery, seo

- Awesome Music Platforms: SEO-maximized list of music platforms for streaming, distribution, beat selling, sample packs, sync licensing, promotion, storefronts, analytics, and independent artist tools.

  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/awesome-music-platforms
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/awesome-music-platforms
  Tags: music platforms, distribution, beat selling, sample packs, sync licensing, discovery, seo

- Awesome Python Audio Science: Python scientific audio, DSP, MIR, machine-learning audio, datasets, notebooks, plugin testing, and creator-audio research tooling; linked to the TizWildin HUB and deconstructed-loop/router ecosystem.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/awesome-python-audio-science.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/awesome-python-audio-science
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/awesome-python-audio-science
  Tags: python audio, scientific audio, DSP, MIR, machine learning audio, datasets, plugin testing, discovery, seo

- FreeEQ8: Flagship free/open audio plugin anchor for GitHub SEO, producer trust, plugin-discovery traffic, and the larger TizWildin audio ecosystem.

  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/FreeEQ8

  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/FreeVox8

- ARC-Neuron-LLMBuilder: Local-first cognition-core builder for ARC: dataset preparation, model-building experiments, GGUF-oriented local AI workflows, receipts, and reproducible AI growth pipelines.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/arc-neuron-llmbuilder.html

- ARC-Core: Signal-intelligence event spine and local-first AI governance console for deterministic routing, authority gates, receipts, calibration, incident tracking, and replayable evidence.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/arc-core.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/ARC-Core
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/ARC-Core
  Tags: ARC, AI governance, receipts, event sourcing, FastAPI, discovery, seo

- arc-lucifer-cleanroom-runtime: Local-first cleanroom AI runtime route for offline model execution, token streaming, deterministic event capture, and reproducible inference behavior.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/arc-lucifer-cleanroom-runtime.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/arc-lucifer-cleanroom-runtime
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/arc-lucifer-cleanroom-runtime
  Tags: local AI, runtime, offline AI, token streaming, discovery, seo

- arc-language-module: Language and cognition foundation route for linguistic structure, transliteration, lineage, phonology, and language-learning data.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/arc-language-module.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/arc-language-module
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/arc-language-module
  Tags: NLP, linguistics, language learning, cognition, discovery, seo

- Arc-RAR: CLI-first archive manager with native-app control plane, autowrap intent validation, receipts, restore paths, and reproducible project archive handling.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/arc-rar.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Arc-RAR
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Arc-RAR
  Tags: archive, CLI, receipts, reproducibility, discovery, seo

- OmniBinary Runtime: Native-first binary intake and execution-fabric scaffold for file inspection, host profiling, lane selection, receipts, audits, and runtime-readiness reporting.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/omnibinary-runtime.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/omnibinary-runtime
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/omnibinary-runtime
  Tags: binary runtime, native first, receipts, audits, discovery, seo

## TizWildin Audio Plugins

- Therum: Bootleg Serum — free wavetable synthesizer with visual waveform editing and modulation.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/therum.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Therum_JUCE-Plugin
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Therum_JUCE-Plugin
  Tags: VST3, AU, flagship, audio-plugin, music-production

- XyloCore: Playable xylophone / tuned-percussion instrument with velocity-mapped samples and keyboard control.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/xylocore.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/XyloCore
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/XyloCore
  Tags: VST3, AU, instruments, audio-plugin, music-production

- AETHER: Choir & atmosphere designer for cinematic sound design — procedural choirs, pads, and evolving textures.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/aether.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/AETHER_Choir-Atmosphere-Designer
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/AETHER_Choir-Atmosphere-Designer
  Tags: VST3, AU, experimental, audio-plugin, music-production

- BassMaid: Bass enhancement and low-end processing toolkit.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/bassmaid.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/BassMaid
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/BassMaid
  Tags: VST3, AU, maid_suite, audio-plugin, music-production

- ChainMaid: Sidechain plugin — clean sidechain ducking and pumping effects for EDM, trap, and mix engineering.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/chainmaid.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/ChainMaid
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/ChainMaid
  Tags: VST3, AU, maid_suite, audio-plugin, music-production

- FreeSampler: Lightweight high-performance audio sampler plugin.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/freesampler.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/FreeSampler_v0.3
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/FreeSampler_v0.3
  Tags: VST3, AU, experimental, audio-plugin, music-production

- GlueMaid: Mix bus glue and cohesion tool — compression and tonal shaping.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/gluemaid.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/GlueMaid
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/GlueMaid
  Tags: VST3, AU, maid_suite, audio-plugin, music-production

- Instrudio: 10 fully playable instruments — cross-platform instrument ecosystem with hybrid HTML/plugin architecture.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/instrudio.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Instrudio
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Instrudio
  Tags: VST3, AU, Standalone, instruments, audio-plugin, music-production

- MeterMaid: Single-plugin mastering + metering suite: BS.1770-4 K-weighted loudness, EBU R128 gated integration, 4× oversampled true peak, spectrogram, chromagram, goniometer, and an octagonal target radar.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/metermaid.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/MeterMaid
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/MeterMaid
  Tags: VST3, AU, Standalone, maid_suite, audio-plugin, music-production

- MixMaid: Real-time spectral balance and mix correction — gently guides mixes toward balanced tonal distribution, proper headroom, and controlled dynamics.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/mixmaid.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/MixMaid
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/MixMaid
  Tags: VST3, AU, maid_suite, audio-plugin, music-production

- MultiMaid: Focused multiband dynamics plugin for the Maid suite — deliberately non-overlapping with FreeEQ8, GlueMaid, MixMaid, BassMaid, SpaceMaid, ChainMaid, and MeterMaid.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/multimaid.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/MultiMaid
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/MultiMaid
  Tags: VST3, AU, Standalone, maid_suite, audio-plugin, music-production

- PaintMask: Visual paint-based audio processing — shape sound with brush strokes, splashes, and geometry that become MIDI patterns.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/paintmask.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/PaintMask_Free-JUCE-Plugin
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/PaintMask_Free-JUCE-Plugin
  Tags: VST3, AU, experimental, audio-plugin, music-production

- PAP-Forge-Audio: Procedural Autonomous Plugins runtime for generating, branching, mutating, validating, and restoring plugin projects from natural-language sound intent.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/pap-forge-audio.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/PAP-Forge-Audio
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/PAP-Forge-Audio
  Tags: VST3, AU, experimental, audio-plugin, music-production

- RiftWave Suite: Modular synth engine + waveform synthesis — RiftSynth + WaveForm in Lite and Pro editions.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/riftwave-suite.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/RiftWaveSuite_RiftSynth_WaveForm_Lite
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/RiftWaveSuite_RiftSynth_WaveForm_Lite
  Tags: VST3, AU, sound_design, audio-plugin, music-production

- SpaceMaid: Spatial audio processing — depth, width, and reverb tools.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/spacemaid.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/SpaceMaid
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/SpaceMaid
  Tags: VST3, AU, maid_suite, audio-plugin, music-production

- VF-PlexLab: VocalForge PersonaPlex Lab — JUCE plugin + local backend + HTML tester around NVIDIA PersonaPlex for voice-conditioned vocal asset generation, spoken hooks, whispers, chants, and sample-pack export.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/vf-plexlab.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/VF-PlexLab
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/VF-PlexLab
  Tags: VST3, AU, experimental, audio-plugin, music-production

- WhisperGate: Procedural whispers, ghost choirs, and ritual atmospheres through an interactive geometry interface.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/whispergate.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/WhisperGate_Free-JUCE-Plugin
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/WhisperGate_Free-JUCE-Plugin
  Tags: VST3, AU, experimental, audio-plugin, music-production

- WURP: Toxic Motion Engine — mutates audio with formant motion, corrosive saturation, elastic pitch, and reactive animated UI.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/wurp.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/WURP_Toxic-Motion-Engine_JUCE
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/WURP_Toxic-Motion-Engine_JUCE
  Tags: VST3, AU, experimental, audio-plugin, music-production

## TizWildin Sample Packs

- Free 808 Producer Kit: 94 hand-crafted 808 bass samples tuned to every chromatic key.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/free-808-producer-kit.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-808-Producer-Kit
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-808-Producer-Kit
  Tags: 808, bass, trap, sample-pack, producer-tools

- Free Dark Piano Sound Kit: 88 piano notes plus dark and cinematic loops and MIDI.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/free-dark-piano-sound-kit.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-Dark-Piano-Sound-Kit
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-Dark-Piano-Sound-Kit
  Tags: piano, cinematic, midi, sample-pack, producer-tools

- Free Future Bass Producer Kit: Loops, fills, drums, bass, synths, pads, and FX.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/free-future-bass-producer-kit.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-Future-Bass-Producer-Kit
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-Future-Bass-Producer-Kit
  Tags: future-bass, loops, synths, sample-pack, producer-tools

- Free Riser Producer Kit: 115+ risers and 63 downlifters - noise, synth, drum, FX, cinematic.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/free-riser-producer-kit.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-Riser-Producer-Kit
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-Riser-Producer-Kit
  Tags: risers, downlifters, fx, sample-pack, producer-tools

- Free Violin Synth Sample Kit: Physical-model violin sample kit rendered from the Instrudio violin instrument.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/free-violin-synth-sample-kit.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-Violin-Synth-Sample-Kit
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Free-Violin-Synth-Sample-Kit
  Tags: violin, physical-model, instrudio, sample-pack, producer-tools

- Phonk Producer Toolkit: Drift phonk starter kit - 808s, cowbells, drums, MIDI, templates.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/phonk-producer-toolkit.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/Phonk_Producer_Toolkit
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/Phonk_Producer_Toolkit
  Tags: phonk, drift, starter, sample-pack, producer-tools

- TizWildin-Aurora: 3-segment original synth melody pack with loops, stems, demo renders, and neon/cinematic phrasing.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/tizwildin-aurora.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Aurora
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Aurora
  Tags: loops, stems, synth, neon, sample-pack, producer-tools

- TizWildin-Chime: Multi-part 88 BPM chime collection spanning glass, void, halo, reed, and neon synthwave lanes.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/tizwildin-chime.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Chime
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Chime
  Tags: chime, glass, 88bpm, sample-pack, producer-tools

- TizWildin-Chroma: Multi-segment game synthwave loop sample pack from TizWildin Entertainment.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/tizwildin-chroma.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Chroma
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Chroma
  Tags: game, synthwave, loops, sample-pack, producer-tools

- TizWildin-Obsidian: Dark cinematic sample pack with choir textures, menu loops, transitions, bass, atmosphere, drums, and electric-banjo extensions.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/tizwildin-obsidian.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Obsidian
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Obsidian
  Tags: cinematic, choir, dark, atmosphere, sample-pack, producer-tools

- TizWildin-Skyline: 30 BPM-tagged synthwave and darkwave loops with generator snapshot and dark neon additions.
  Page: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/tizwildin-skyline.html
  Public URL: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Skyline
  GitHub: https://github.com/GareBear99/TizWildin-Skyline
  Tags: synthwave, darkwave, loops, sample-pack, producer-tools

- Repository file search: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/repo-file-search.html

- ARC-Core source index: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/source-arc-core.html
- Arc-RAR source index: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/source-arc-rar.html
- OmniBinary Runtime source index: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/source-omnibinary-runtime.html
- ARC-Neuron-LLMBuilder source index: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/source-arc-neuron-llmbuilder.html
- arc-lucifer-cleanroom-runtime source index: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/source-arc-lucifer-cleanroom-runtime.html
- arc-language-module source index: https://garebear99.github.io/TizWildinEntertainmentHUB/pages/source-arc-language-module.html
